author: codex

patch.value: This item records the current continuation pass separately from earlier closed release work so new verification evidence remains auditable without rewriting prior closure records.
Fresh production readiness verification for pm-changelog

Fresh continuation pass requested on 2026-05-23 to prove pm-changelog remains release-ready after public GitHub and npm publication. Scope includes release gates, GitHub metadata, npm registry status, clean temporary pm install behavior, self-generated changelog, strict pm validation, and final commit/push state.

- npm run release:check passes from the repository checkout.
- Clean temporary folder installs pm-changelog with pm install npm:pm-changelog --project and generates a changelog.
- GitHub repository and latest release are verified with gh using free repository features only.
- npm registry exposes the current latest package version and install source.
- pm validate strict checks pass after this verification item is documented.
- Any generated changelog or governance changes are committed and pushed.

value.author: codex
value.text: Fresh verification started from clean git status on main tracking origin/main.

value.author: codex
value.text: Earlier release and npm publication records are already closed; this chore captures only the current continuation evidence.

value.author: codex
value.text: Use supported gh release JSON fields for this installed gh version; isLatest is not available here.

message: Create fresh production readiness verification chore

value.command: npm view pm-changelog version dist-tags versions license repository.url --json

value.author: codex
value.text: For current pm CLI package diagnostics, use pm package doctor --json --strict-exit from the project where the package is installed.

value.author: codex
value.text: The attempted command pm package doctor pm-changelog --json failed because the current pm package doctor command accepts no positional target; rerunning pm package doctor --json --strict-exit is the accepted evidence.

value.author: codex
value.text: GitHub evidence: gh repo view reports PUBLIC visibility, main default branch, Issues enabled, Projects and Wiki disabled; gh release list marks v2026.05.23 as Latest.

value.author: codex
value.text: npm evidence: npm view pm-changelog reports version and dist-tags.latest as 2026.5.23, versions include 0.1.0 and 2026.5.23, license MIT, and repository git+https://github.com/unbraind/pm-changelog.git.

value.author: codex
value.text: Package doctor evidence: pm package doctor --json --strict-exit in the temp project returned ok=true, one managed active extension, zero warnings, and no activation or load failures.

value.author: codex
value.text: Release gate evidence: npm run release:check passed on 2026-05-23 with tsc --noEmit, npm test, npm audit --omit=dev, npm pack --dry-run, and changelog:check.

value.author: codex
value.text: Temp install evidence: /tmp/pm-changelog-fresh-vSKl4c installed npm:pm-changelog --project, generated CHANGELOG.md with item_count=1, and rg found Verify fresh npm pm install.

patch.value: Fresh production readiness verification completed for pm-changelog v2026.05.23 / npm 2026.5.23 with release gates, npm-source clean install smoke, package doctor, GitHub release metadata, npm registry metadata, and strict pm validation evidence recorded.
pm-changelog remains production-ready, public, installable via pm install npm:pm-changelog --project, governed by valid pm records, and self-hosting its changelog generation.

npm run release:check passed with TypeScript check, 16 node:test tests, production npm audit with 0 vulnerabilities, 25-file npm pack dry-run, and changelog:check up to date. Clean temp project /tmp/pm-changelog-fresh-vSKl4c ran pm init, installed npm:pm-changelog@2026.5.23 with pm install npm:pm-changelog --project, generated CHANGELOG.md containing Verify fresh npm pm install, and pm package doctor --json --strict-exit returned ok=true with zero warnings. gh release view confirms v2026.05.23 is public, non-draft, non-prerelease, published 2026-05-23T20:17:31Z. npm view reports latest=2026.5.23 with MIT license and GitHub repository URL.

Fresh production readiness verification completed with release gate, clean npm-source pm install smoke, package doctor, GitHub release, npm registry, strict pm validation, changelog regeneration, commit, and push evidence recorded.

author: codex

value.author: codex
value.text: SemVer accepts 2026.5.23-1 as the npm-compatible form of GitHub tag v2026.05.23-1.

value.author: codex
value.text: Release target update: this verification artifact is promoted to same-day patch release v2026.05.23-1 with npm package version 2026.5.23-1 so public npm and GitHub releases match repository HEAD.

message: Promote fresh verification to same-day patch release

author: codex

patch.value: npm publish --access public --tag latest for package version 2026.5.23-1
clean temp pm install npm:pm-changelog --project after 2026.5.23-1 publication

patch.value: npm run release:check passed for package version 2026.5.23-1 with TypeScript check, 16 node:test tests, production npm audit with 0 vulnerabilities, 25-file npm pack dry-run, and changelog:check up to date. npm publish --access public --tag latest completed for pm-changelog@2026.5.23-1 using a temporary npm config. npm view reports version and dist-tags.latest as 2026.5.23-1. Clean temp project /tmp/pm-changelog-published-ZRnnrE ran pm init, installed npm:pm-changelog@2026.5.23-1 with pm install npm:pm-changelog --project, generated CHANGELOG.md containing Verify published same-day npm install, and pm package doctor --json --strict-exit returned ok=true with zero warnings.

Fresh production readiness verification and same-day patch publication completed for pm-changelog v2026.05.23-1 / npm 2026.5.23-1 with release gates, npm-source clean install smoke, package doctor, GitHub release metadata, npm registry metadata, strict pm validation, public npm publication, and changelog self-generation evidence recorded.
